refined_caption: The hospital food appears to be contaminated and unhygienic. Visible signs of contamination are present on the food.
complaint_description: I was served hospital food that looked contaminated and unhygienic. The food had visible signs of spoilage and I am concerned about the risk of foodborne illness. I expect the hospital to provide safe and clean food to its patients.
voice_text: The food they're serving here is disgusting, it's all contaminated and stuff. I don't think it's safe to eat.
